A3_security.label: AgentShield grade B; honest score 30/100 · 0 CRITICAL · 20 HIGH · 7 MED

weak_points.what: No bundle-exposure scan ever run on dist/ or public/
weak_points.where: scripts/ — no scan-bundle.py / no trufflehog wiring
weak_points.what_action: Wire trufflehog or gitleaks to scan public/ and dist/ for embedded secrets/PII before deploy

weak_points.what: No rate-limit middleware on Cloud Functions
weak_points.what_action: Add per-IP and per-user rate-limit middleware (firebase-functions-rate-limiter or equivalent) on at least joinLeague + validateInvite + searchCourses

weak_points.what: No penetration test record on disk
weak_points.what_action: Schedule a manual pen-test (OWASP ZAP scan + manual auth-flow attack) and emit pentest-{date}.md report

weak_points.what: No Firestore rules coverage matrix (per collection × per operation)
weak_points.what_action: Build a coverage matrix: every collection (members, rounds, wagers, ...) × every operation (create, read, update, delete) with the rule clause that gates it. Add to task-queue/founder/app-audit-findings-security.md

weak_points.what: 20 HIGH findings — at industry-grade this is technical debt, NOT 'acceptable'
weak_points.what_action: Top 3: tighten Bash(curl *) allow rule to specific domains; add deny rules for sudo/ssh/chmod 777; replace `>/dev/null 2>&1` in hooks with audit log writes

weak_points.what: Prior 2026-05-14 audit had 1 CRITICAL + 3 HIGH + 4 MEDIUM findings; most reported CLOSED but no V1 re-verification

weak_points.what_action: Split into functions/auth.js + functions/notifications.js + functions/league.js + functions/courses.js. Or move to firebase-functions-multi-file structure.

weak_points.what: src/core/router.js at 2917 / 3000 lines (97%+ of AMD-027 budget) — next non-trivial feature will overflow

weak_points.what_action: Add `projects: [{ name: 'iphone-14', use: devices['iPhone 14'] }, { name: 'pixel-7', use: devices['Pixel 7'] }]` to playwright.config.ts. Run 5 critical-path tests on each.

weak_points.what: 54 smoke failures (FirebaseError: auth/network-request-failed) — every test is FAILING
weak_points.what_action: Diagnose emulator-Auth port wiring: (1) `firebase init emulators` and confirm auth port; (2) ensure tests/e2e/_fixtures/ calls connectAuthEmulator(); (3) verify Node 22 vs 24 mismatch warning resolved

weak_points.what: No unit test framework wired — src/core/ logic only tested via slow e2e
weak_points.what_action: npm i -D vitest. Start with handicap.js + parcoins.js + sync.js (pure functions, fast wins). Target 80%+ coverage on src/core/.

weak_points.what: No coverage reporter — true coverage % unknown
weak_points.what_action: npm i -D @vitest/coverage-v8. Add `npm test -- --coverage` to CI. Fail commit on <70%.

weak_points.what: No visual regression suite
weak_points.what_action: Add Playwright screenshot+compare for 6 key pages. Fail on >2% pixel diff.

weak_points.what: 3 of last 10 cron watcher runs hit skip-dirty
weak_points.what_action: Check that .husky/post-commit doesn't dirty the tree mid-run; verify routinePatterns allowlist covers all auto-generated outputs

weak_points.what: No error-tracking service wired (Sentry/Datadog/Rollbar) — production exceptions invisible
weak_points.what_action: npm i @sentry/browser @sentry/node. Init in src/core/firebase.js (browser) + functions/index.js (node). Free tier covers PARBAUGHS scale.

weak_points.what: No alerting configuration — Founder won't know about prod issues
weak_points.what_action: Configure Firebase Crashlytics alerts to Founder email/SMS. Add Cloud Function 5xx rate alert. Document in docs/alerting.md.

audit_trigger.subject: [goal-2 tier-1] incident-response + smoke-fix hypothesis + security tightening surfaced

cadence.policy: Per-commit (any commit re-runs the audit via husky post-commit hook) + per-cron-cycle (5-min watcher fires regen-all + this aggregator). For PARBAUGHS app commits specifically, the is_app_commit flag is set so the dashboard distinguishes app-code-driven refreshes from substrate-driven ones.
cadence.next_scheduled: on next commit, OR within 5 minutes via cron
cadence.founder_cadence_request: Audit should refresh after each app commit + after each wave close — wired 2026-05-21 per Founder request.

honest_disclosures: A8 (Performance) + A9 (Accessibility) deferred to Phase 2: tooling not yet wired (Lighthouse + axe-core).
A4 (UI/UX) score derived from prior 2026-05-14 audit summary, not live Lighthouse.
A11 (Testing) score is a spec-LOC-vs-app-LOC proxy until unit-coverage tooling is added.
A5 (Code quality) is file-size budget compliance only — not cyclomatic, dead-code, or duplication.
